title: paraspalathus multiflora
intro: Paraspalathus multiflora, also known as the bushy broom bush, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paraspalathus multiflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Paraspalathus multiflora have been made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
